completed_slices.summary: Added the scratch Herdr layout v2 proof script and evidence note. The script supports dry-run and real modes, uses harmless shell commands in scratch Herdr workspaces, exercises split/move/close/layout primitives, and documents 1-4 worker geometry including the 3-worker Herdr-backed fallback. No daemon runtime files were changed.

acceptance_status.criterion: Add scripts/proof-herdr-layout-v2 with a dry-run mode and a real mode that uses harmless shell commands, not KD workers, to exercise Herdr pane split/move/close/layout mechanics for the v2 cockpit shape.
acceptance_status.evidence: scripts/proof-herdr-layout-v2 was added executable. Dry-run prints the Herdr command plan without invoking Herdr; real mode creates scratch workspaces, uses pane run with printf/sleep commands, and exercises tab create, pane move, pane close, pane split, and pane layout. bash -n and dry-run passed; real smoke runs for workers 1-4 passed with KHAZAD_HERDR_LAYOUT_PROOF_SLEEP=1.

acceptance_status.criterion: The proof defines the target layout as a left worker region and a right full-height dashboard, with 1 worker filling the worker region, 2 workers side-by-side, and 3-4 workers arranged as a 2x2 grid or a documented Herdr-backed fallback.
acceptance_status.evidence: The script target banner/geometry notes and docs/design/evidence/herdr-layout-v2-proof-2026-07-08.md define the left worker region plus right full-height dashboard. The evidence doc's worker-count table documents 1-worker, 2-worker, 4-worker 2x2, and the 3-worker Herdr-backed fallback that avoids an unused spacer pane.

acceptance_status.criterion: Write docs/design/evidence/herdr-layout-v2-proof-2026-07-08.md with commands, observed Herdr capabilities, limitations, and explicit confirmation that pane layout/scrollback is observability only and not KD correctness evidence.
acceptance_status.evidence: docs/design/evidence/herdr-layout-v2-proof-2026-07-08.md was added with Commands, Observed Herdr capabilities, Worker-count geometry, and Limitations and fallback sections. It explicitly states: 'Pane layout/scrollback is observability only and not KD correctness evidence.' Required grep checks passed.

acceptance_status.criterion: Do not change daemon runtime behavior in this slice.
acceptance_status.evidence: Only scripts/proof-herdr-layout-v2 and docs/design/evidence/herdr-layout-v2-proof-2026-07-08.md changed; no src/, Cargo, daemon config, or runtime workflow files were modified. git status was clean after commit fbd5ba4f0ea90ed45187302fa1a8b330a8c06fe0.

assumptions: The 3-worker fallback is within the acceptance grant for a documented Herdr-backed fallback because it preserves the top-level left worker region/right full-height dashboard and avoids adding a non-worker spacer or idle shell.
Real proof mode confines move/close operations to scratch workspaces created by scripts/proof-herdr-layout-v2 and addressed by returned Herdr ids.

completed_slices.summary: Implemented internal cockpit layout v2 planning and Herdr adapter layout hooks. The default run cockpit now plans only a right Dashboard and left worker region, worker panes are assigned stable worker-1..worker-4 slots, Herdr layout failures remain visibility-only fallback incidents, and the layout proof note documents the runtime seam.
public_interfaces_changed: Internal Rust cockpit interfaces changed: CockpitAdapter gained layout inspection/dashboard/slot-placement hooks, CockpitWorkerOpened now reports slot_name, and CockpitRunRequest no longer carries the removed default Operator/attend pane command. No CLI or persistent config surface was added.

acceptance_status.criterion: Add a tested layout planner for the v2 cockpit contract: dashboard right, worker region left, stable worker slot names for 1-4 workers, and no default Operator column.
acceptance_status.evidence: src/workflow/cockpit.rs adds CockpitLayoutPlanner with Dashboard as right-dashboard split from worker-1, left-worker-region slots worker-1 through worker-4, and no Operator pane creation. Tests matching cargo test -q cockpit_layout cover dashboard/right + worker/left geometry, stable 1-4 slot names, slot advancement, and no default Operator pane.

acceptance_status.criterion: Add Herdr adapter operations needed by the planner, such as dashboard pane creation or reuse, placeholder/root-pane cleanup, worker pane movement or slot placement, and layout inspection, while keeping the adapter as the only Herdr-specific implementation seam.
acceptance_status.evidence: CockpitAdapter now exposes inspect_layout, ensure_dashboard_pane, cleanup_placeholder_root_pane, and place_worker_slot_pane. HerdrCockpitAdapter implements them with pane list/layout, split, rename/run, Dashboard reuse, root-pane reuse for worker-1, and planned worker-slot splits; manager code still calls only workflow::cockpit helpers.

acceptance_status.criterion: Existing cockpit open/fallback semantics remain non-fatal visibility behavior; Herdr layout failures must not change worker authorization, verification, merge, handoff readiness, or run terminal status by themselves.
acceptance_status.evidence: Layout errors flow through the existing CockpitUnavailable/cockpit_unavailable run incident and cockpit_worker_fallback-to-direct paths in manager.rs; authorization, verification, merge, handoff, and terminal status logic were not changed. cargo check -q passed.

acceptance_status.criterion: Record layout-related incidents/events as observability metadata only; do not make Herdr pane text, scrollback, metadata, or Pi display state correctness evidence.
acceptance_status.evidence: manager.rs now tags cockpit_ready and cockpit fallback incidents with cockpit_layout_v2_observability_only while retaining source_of_truth as daemon_state or kd_artifact_files. The evidence note explicitly states pane text, scrollback, labels, and Pi display state are visibility aids only, with worker artifacts and verification gates remaining authoritative.

assumptions: No public CLI or persistent config change was needed or added.
Herdr pane labels are used only to choose visual worker slots inside the cockpit adapter; they are not workflow correctness evidence.
Worker slot planning is intentionally bounded to the accepted 1-4 worker contract; attempts beyond that surface as non-fatal Herdr cockpit fallback to direct execution.

completed_slices.summary: Implemented compact dashboard v2 feed projection with Run, Workers, Attention, actionable Commands, Checks, Economics, and incident sections; shortened worker profile display; kept attention/terminal/operator-command text daemon-fed and untruncated; documented before/after and attach-only observability invariant.

acceptance_status.criterion: Add or update a compact dashboard/feed projection that fits the right panel without long profile-line wrapping and without duplicating worker blocks.
acceptance_status.evidence: src/workflow/projection.rs now projects compact Run/Workers/Attention/Checks/Economics sections, uses compact worker profile text, and dashboard_v2 tests assert old Todos/Worker/Progress/Activity/Tail duplicate block labels are absent.

acceptance_status.criterion: Dashboard v2 includes concise sections for Run, Workers, Attention, Checks, Economics, Incidents when present, and Commands when actionable.
acceptance_status.evidence: project_run_at builds Run, Workers, Attention, optional Commands, Checks, Economics, and optional Incidents blocks; tests cover no-command and actionable-command cases.

acceptance_status.criterion: Attention lines remain full and untruncated; renderer polish must not invent workflow wording beyond daemon-owned status/feed fields.
acceptance_status.evidence: Attention/terminal/replan/question lines are emitted without projection truncation and rendered unbounded for StatusFeedRole::Attention; render_monitor_dashboard_v2_uses_feed_only_and_keeps_attention_unbounded asserts feed-only rendering and full attention output.

acceptance_status.criterion: Document the dashboard v2 before/after and the invariant that monitor/dashboard output is attach-only observability over daemon state.
acceptance_status.evidence: docs/design/evidence/herdr-dashboard-v2-2026-07-08.md records before/after sections and the attach-only observability invariant.

assumptions: Kept StatusFeed feed_version at 1 because the JSON feed shape is unchanged; dashboard v2 is a projection/layout revision over the existing daemon status/feed schema.

completed_slices.summary: Placed native Pi TUI workers through the cockpit layout v2 planner: TUI agents are staged, moved into stable left worker slots, renamed with slot labels, and recorded with slot metadata while result parsing remains artifact-only.
completed_slices.commit_message: khazad(layout): place TUI workers in grid

acceptance_status.criterion: Native Pi TUI worker launches use layout v2 placement: no unused root shell left visible, no default Operator column, and worker panes occupy the left worker region.
acceptance_status.evidence: src/workflow/cockpit.rs now routes open_tui_worker_agent through CockpitLayoutPlanner, ensures the right Dashboard, selects worker-1..worker-4 slots, starts TUI agents in a staging tab, moves the agent pane into the planned left slot, renames it, and closes replaced root/staging panes. Tests include cockpit_tui_worker_uses_layout_v2_worker_slot and cockpit_tui_worker_grid_advances_stable_left_worker_slots_for_four_workers.

acceptance_status.criterion: For up to 4 concurrent TUI workers, KD records stable worker slot metadata with the cockpit_worker_ready event while keeping source_of_truth as kd_tui_result_artifact.
acceptance_status.evidence: CockpitTuiWorkerOpened carries slot name/index/region, and src/workflow/manager.rs records layout_planner, worker_slot_name, worker_slot_index, worker_region, agent_name/terminal_id, and source_of_truth=kd_tui_result_artifact on cockpit_worker_ready. cargo test -q tui_worker_grid validates worker-1 through worker-4 assignment.

acceptance_status.criterion: Worker timeout and cancellation paths still close the associated Herdr pane on a best-effort basis and never read pane text as result evidence.
acceptance_status.evidence: wait_for_pi_tui_worker_result still watches only artifacts.result_path, parses via parse_pi_tui_worker_result_artifact, and calls close_default_pane(opened.pane_id) on result or cancellation. No pane text/scrollback read path was added.

acceptance_status.criterion: Existing wrapper/direct fallback behavior remains available when experimental native TUI is disabled or Herdr TUI launch is unavailable.
acceptance_status.evidence: run_herdr_worker_or_direct still selects the wrapper path when experimental_pi_tui_worker is false, direct cockpit mode still returns SkippedDirect, and TUI launch/layout errors still map to CockpitWorkerJobError::Fallback before direct_runner.run. cargo test -q tui_worker and cargo check -q passed.
